endpoints.label: Create or Update Member

fields.label: Workspace Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Identity
fields.description: The identity is used to find the member. If no member exists, a new member will be created and linked to the provided identity. (JSON object; supported keys: identityValue, identityValue.source, identityValue.searchBy, identityValue.id, identityValue.username, identityValue.email, identityValue.host)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: bio, birthday, company, location, name, pronouns, shippingAddress, slug, tagsToAdd, tagList, tShirt, teammate, url)
